## Testing Done

## Checklist

- [ ] All new interactive elements have a `title` tooltip attribute
- [ ] New features are documented in the `HELP_CONTENT` array in JavaScript
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated
- [ ] Code follows the established style (CSS variables, const/let, early returns)
- [ ] No external dependencies added
- [ ] No AI API calls added
- [ ] Application still works as a single HTML file with no build step
